Tell us about the situation you're in. What are you trying to accomplish?
Concrete real-world use cases ("I have 8 ESP32s scattered around my greenhouse
and I want to ...") land much better than abstract requests.

<!-- A user story or short walkthrough of how you'd interact with the feature. -->
